about.title: About SVD Tool
about.description: A component-based CMSIS-SVD file parser, visual editor, and document generator
about.feature.multi_doc: Multi-document tabs for editing multiple SVD files simultaneously
about.feature.visual_edit: Visual tree editor for peripheral, register, and field hierarchy
about.feature.three_level: Interrupt vector table configuration and management
about.feature.interrupt: Bit-field visualization and peripheral address map diagrams
about.feature.batch_ops: Batch modify, generate, and clone registers
about.feature.chain_ops: Chain operation rules engine for auto-syncing related changes
about.feature.diff_merge: SVD file diff comparison and import merge
about.feature.export_doc: Export to CSV / Markdown / HTML documentation
about.author: Author
welcome.description:
Professional SVD file visual editor
Supports CMSIS-SVD standard format

ai.error.no_api_key: Please configure API Key in settings first
val.device_name_special: Device name '{name}' contains special characters. Only letters, numbers and underscores are recommended
val.version_suggest: It is recommended to set a version, e.g. '1.0' or 'V0.1'
val.size_invalid: Default register size {size} is invalid, CMSIS-SVD requires: 8(0x08), 16(0x10), 32(0x20), 64(0x40)
val.cpu_name_not_standard: CPU name '{name}' is not in the standard CMSIS CPU list
val.cpu_name_standard_values: Standard values: CM0, CM0+, CM3, CM4, CM4_FP, CM7, etc.
val.endian_invalid: Endian '{endian}' is invalid, should be: little, big, selectable
val.nvic_prio_range: NVIC priority bits {bits} out of normal range (1-8)
val.periph_name_case_conflict: Peripheral name '{name}' and '{other}' differ only in case but may conflict
val.derived_not_exist: Peripheral '{name}' has derivedFrom='{derived}' which does not exist
val.derived_confirm: Please confirm that peripheral '{derived}' is defined
val.base_addr_invalid: Peripheral '{name}' has invalid base address '{addr}' (not a valid hex number)
val.check_base_addr: Please check baseAddress and addressBlock configuration
val.reg_name_empty: Register in peripheral '{periph}' has empty name
val.reg_offset_invalid: Register '{periph}.{reg}' has invalid offset '{offset}' (not a valid hex number)
val.reg_size_invalid: Register '{periph}.{reg}' has invalid size={size}. CMSIS-SVD requires: 8(0x08), 16(0x10), 32(0x20), 64(0x40)
val.reg_access_invalid: Register '{periph}.{reg}' has invalid access='{access}', should be: {valid}
val.reg_reset_overflow: Register '{periph}.{reg}' resetValue=0x{reset:X} exceeds size={size} bit range (max 0x{max:X})
val.reg_offset_duplicate: Registers {regs} in peripheral '{periph}' have the same offset address ({offset})
val.reg_offset_unique: Register offset addresses must be unique within a peripheral
val.field_range_exceed: Field '{periph}.{reg}.{field}' range [{start}:{end}] exceeds register width of {reg_size} bits
val.field_no_overlap: Fields in the same register cannot occupy the same bit
val.field_gap_info: Register '{periph}.{reg}' has {uncovered}/{reg_size} bits not covered by fields
val.irq_periph_not_exist: Interrupt '{name}' references peripheral '{periph}' which does not exist
val.irq_periph_confirm: Please confirm that peripheral '{periph}' is defined
val.irq_number_duplicate: Interrupt number {value} is used by multiple interrupts: {names}
val.irq_number_unique: Each interrupt should have a unique interrupt number
val.conflict_reg_offset: Offset conflict: same offset address (0x{offset:04X}) as register '{name}'
val.conflict_field_bit: Field conflict: overlaps with field '{name}' [{start}:{end}] in bit range
